title: Authenticated Crawls, Sessions, Tenant Isolation, and Privacy · Type Forensics
summary: A preserved TypeScript crawl trace contains one plausible scope, URL, robots, Fetch, stream, Cheerio, selector, frontier, Promise, browser, axe, report, security, or shutdown defect; identify the first invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in least-authority session and privacy policy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and ev…
objectives: Require explicit owner and account authorization, purpose, role, environment, page scope, time window, and revocation for authenticated access.
Acquire secrets through approved channels, avoid source and logs, scope them minimally, rotate exposure, and destroy temporary material.
Permit safe retrieval only, block state-changing forms and logout or destructive routes, and test same-site side effects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Session Authorization
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 2942 during an origin-fairness and event-loop capacity rehearsal. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove least-authority sessions, secrets, safe methods, isolation, minimization, and derived-data deletion; owner authorization and revocation must remain separate from robots and legal-review claims; then change one HTML repair, Cheerio mode, selector, unknown value, record schema, link relation, or metadata case and retain rejected evidence. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Require explicit owner and account authorization, purpose, role, environment, page scope, time window, and revocation for authenticated access.

Inspect the Session Authorization trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
